review_notes: v001 direct pixel authoring. Head map widened to 13px (vs the 11px arkady template) to give the high tight bun clearance to bulge past the skull silhouette — dominant identity feature per card. Skin planes: flesh_1 dominant (unlike arkady's inverted flesh_0-dominant palette), flesh_2 lamplit strip on forehead/cheekbone, flesh_0 restrained per card. Pencil-behind-ear is baked into HEAD_BASE as a permanent identity pixel (always visible, not a per-pose stamp) after an early revision floated it outside the head silhouette. Apron redrawn to taper with the torso (was a flat rectangular slab in the first pass). Standing-pose legs corrected from full-length dress/trouser color to dress-hem-to-knee + bare shin + shoe block, matching the seated leg treatment (first pass incorrectly read as trousers). Signature pose (arms folded high, pencil hand tapping the opposite elbow) sweeps the near arm shoulder->elbow->across the chest; draw order fixed so the apron is painted before the near-arm layer, not after, so the fold is not overpainted. Cardigan drape included as a same-sheet exhausted-pose variant per card `Prohibited changes` note (appears only after midnight); other 8 poses have no cardigan. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts on every PNG; inspected at 8x sheet, 16x head crop, and 10x signature/exhausted crops.
self_critique: Bun reads as a distinct round mass in silhouette but is built from stair-stepped 1px rows at this scale — acceptable pixel-art rounding, flagged for a possible future smoothing pass if reviewers want a cleaner curve.

Signature-pose folded arms read as a visible diagonal skin band across the chest but are subtle at native 48x96 scale (same abstraction level as arkady's raised-finger signature); a stronger read would need widening the frame, which is out of scope (locked 48x96 frame).

Six-silhouette check run against the only other completed character in the project (arkady) — gennady/lev/nikolai packages do not yet exist in review_queue to composite against; galina's bun+folded-block silhouette is clearly distinct from arkady's narrow vertical pencil-stroke silhouette.
